name: openclaw 2026.3.13
body:
### Changes
- Select on table when list items are tapped to allow hovering table items for quick actions (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#4019)
- Show `Connections` and `Voice` pages within Chat settings to show help information for chat (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#4018)
- Make `Keyboard` section in Chat settings collapsible for small screens (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#4016)
- Add `Current state` section to chat settings to show information about current connection and voice (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#4014)
- Add `Setups` grouping to Chat settings to organize settings (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#4012)
- Add `Configure` grouping to Chat settings (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#4011)
- Add new `Settings` page to a configure in Android app and reorganize existing settings (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#4006)
- Add web view component and use it for update alert in Android (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#4001)
- Add Android button for resetting local storage (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#3996)
- Add built in profile for Chat settings and profile for Automation settings and update layout with a compacted view for mobile (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#3997)
- Add `Database` section in Chat settings for SQLite specific settings (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#3994)
- Add `Auto connect` section for Chat settings (Thanks @ItzCrazyKns). (#3993)
- Bump `boto3` from 1.37.7 to 1.37.9 (Thanks @dependabot). (#4013)
- Bump `boto3` from 1.37.6 to 1.37.7 (Thanks @dependabot). (#4002)
- Bump `boto3` from 1.37.5 to 1.37.6 (Thanks @dependabot). (#3998)
- Bump `boto3` from 1.37.4 to 1.37.5 (Thanks @dependabot). (#3995)
- Bump `boto3` from 1.37.2 to 1.37.4 (Thanks @dependabot). (#3987)
- Allow setting development instance of team for Pipedrive datasource (Thanks @k-lee04). (#4020)
- Update resend webhooks if display updated, not on creating resend integration (Thanks @mandilin). (#4024)
- Always load workflow input metadata (Thanks @Fyzie). (#4022)
- Load module attributes separately and categorize and order module entries (Thanks @Fyzie). (#4021)
- Add hotkey to clear filter or search if there is no matching option (Thanks @Fye). (#4017)
- Add tooltip for "When closing app, remember choice" (Thanks @moji74). (#4005)
- Stop allowing access of shared workflows by orgs without access (Thanks @Fyzie). (#4007)
- Add support for storing StateManagementBehavior in workflow definition (Thanks @Fyzie). (#4008)
- Ensure users can input spaces in prompts for "Summarize list" in the AI Dialog to get wider input box (Thanks @moji74). (#4004)
- Add note to google OAuth page to mention max 50 scopes (Thanks @lammin). (#4003)
- Add support for pagination on backend for reading and writing workflows (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3992)
- Add new category for data sources that have no group (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3991)
- Add support to fetch up to 30 data sources for background jobs (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3990)
- Add metadata text for sequence sorts (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3989)
- Update help text in module list to explain "Read data from another service" (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3988)
- Add display text for schedule automation in API list view (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3986)
- Load more module data for AI App workflows (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3983)
- Update help text in AI App modules to explain no group (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3982)
- Add app info to discovery and webview about access from org after launching (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3980)
- Add more checks for financial tools in workspace metadata (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3981)
- Update tooltip for schema formatting options (Thanks @moji74). (#3978)
- Update stripe webhook help text for usage record requirements (Thanks @cynthiajang). (#3999)
- Add display text for advanced "When closing app" options (Thanks @moji74). (#4000)
- Load filters and search for AI App workflow list (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Update websocket connection errors to say connection names instead of IDs (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Update settings help text for workflow history and add context on retention time (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Load API settings modal inputs into corresponding sections for display (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Switch release note link to new release note tag format (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3984)
- Read more module names for workflows on backend (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3985)
- Add App scripts to endpoint view for API (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3976)
- Add filters for basic/advanced if can be configured for AI App workflows (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3977)
- Add tooltip to explain search inclusion settings (Thanks @moji74). (#3974)
- Add dummy text on new API for add "share with" (Thanks @moji74). (#3973)
- Allow selecting chat settings section to select from in tablet view (Thanks @moji74). (#3972)

### Fixes
- Fix triggers for LegacyModel providers (Thanks @Fyzie). (#4025)
- Fix Slack action label on schedule edit page and add warning for unsupported action with missing label (Thanks @Fyzie). (#4023)
- Fix search keywords not updated for workflows (Thanks @Fyzie). (#4015)
- Fix interface not reading custom category for modules (Thanks @Fyzie). (#4010)
- Fix slack log action in data source history (Thanks @Fyzie). (#4009)
- Fix missing "Gather" in AI App discovery if feature flags disabled (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Fix AI App access data not updating during load (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Fix no actions shown in UI for list types in AI App modules (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Fix search values not updating when loading app list (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Fix error for schedule automation pagination for extremely long schedules (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Fix pagination errors on module list (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Fix data source help text for dependent on parent source (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
- Fix AI App webhook list actions to show name of workflow (Thanks @Fyzie). (#3993)
